test.command: cd frontend && bun test; cd backend && cargo test

typecheck.command: cd frontend && npm run check; cd backend && cargo check

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to reflect that SSR bootstrap now forwards URL `type` and `ack` filters to backend params (`video_type`, `acknowledged`).

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared architecture notes are stale for SSR filter forwarding and can mislead future workers.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate observation across both fix reviews; applied once via library update
